decisions.rationale: Test modules directly (db.py, jellyfin_library.py) without Flask coupling to enable future framework changes

decisions.decision: pytest framework with pytest-mock and responses
decisions.rationale: Industry standard for Python testing with excellent Python 3.13 compatibility

decisions.decision: In-memory SQLite with tmp_path for database testing
decisions.rationale: Complete test isolation prevents state leakage between tests

context_notes: Milestone v1.3 initialization complete. Research conducted on Stack, Features, Architecture, and Pitfalls. Requirements defined with 12 requirements across 4 categories (Infrastructure, Database, API, Coverage/CI). Roadmap created with 4 phases (14-17). Ready to begin Phase 14: Test Infrastructure Setup. This phase covers INFRA-01 through INFRA-04: pytest framework setup, conftest.py with fixtures, framework-agnostic test structure, and pytest configuration in pyproject.toml.
